The Problem We Solve

Most cars need servicing twice a year. Most people keep postponing it.

Mechanics are closed Sundays. Nobody wants to burn a weekday sitting in a service center. And once you drop your keys off, you're stuck, stranded without freedom or flexibility.

So the maintenance gets delayed. The routine checkup gets skipped. The vehicle suffers.

"I launched Papapik after realizing how easily dealerships take advantage of everyday car owners. Our expertise is now your shield on every single trip."

— Papa Shine, Founder & Lead Driver

Get Your First Pickup Free

Step by Step

How every Papapik pickup works.

A signed procedure, photo-documented, tracked live. Nothing left to chance.

01 · Schedule

You Book. We Confirm.

Submit via our form or LINE. We confirm your slot by phone, LINE, or email.

02 · Pickup

We Arrive & Document.

Our driver arrives on time, photographs your car's condition, signs a service contract with you, then walks you through the plan and estimated price.

03 · Service

We Negotiate. You Relax.

We take it to your preferred garage, review every work item, and send you a LINE update at every stage. Nothing gets approved without your say.

04 · Return

Car Back. Case Closed.

Your car is returned to your door. We review the bill together, you sign off, payment is collected, and the case is marked complete on LINE.

Working Hours

Mon–Sat: Service 08:00–17:00 · Booking 08:00–20:00 · Closed Sunday

Safety Standards

Your vehicle is in the safest hands.

Safety isn't a tagline here. It's a checklist, a signed contract, and a policy number you can verify.

Background-Checked Drivers

Every driver passes a criminal background check and full service training before handling any customer's keys. No exceptions, ever.

Pre-Trip Photo Inspection

We photograph your car's complete condition at every handover, timestamped and shared with you on LINE. You always know exactly what we picked up and returned.

Fully Insured in Transit

Every pickup is covered from the moment we take the keys to the moment you sign the return. If something goes wrong on our side, we own it completely.

Signed Service Agreement

Both parties sign before we move your car. The agreement was drafted by our own legal team (Papa Sun). You always talk to a real person, not a chatbot.

Live LINE Updates

Every status change — pickup confirmed, at garage, work approved, car returned — is pushed to you on LINE in real time. Zero chasing required.

Transparent Billing

We send you the exact bill before collecting payment. Nothing is approved without your confirmation. Pay by cash, QR, or card.

The Founding Team

Four Papas. One mission.

We built Papapik because we were frustrated with the same problem you are. We're not a corporation — we're four co-founders who own every detail.

Founder · Head Papa

Papa Shine

Lead Driver & Operations

The man who knows every garage in Bangkok by name. Papa Shine designed our entire operation, from driver conduct to negotiation. He's the reason no inflated invoice makes it past us.

Co-Founder

Papa Best

Client Relations & Bookings

The voice you'll hear when you call us. Papa Best owns every client relationship, from the first booking to the final handover. He makes sure no one gets left behind.

Co-Founder

Papa Sun

Legal & HR

Papapik's legal backbone. Papa Sun authored our service agreements, driver contracts, and compliance standards. When something needs resolving, he's who you talk to.

Co-Founder · Latest Join

Papa Leung

Technology & Systems

The brain behind our booking systems, LINE integrations, and tracking infrastructure. Papa Leung makes sure the tech runs invisibly smooth, so every experience just works.
